languages.text: "Вижу, почтенные Адептус Механикус не отказали в помощи самоуправцу. Как могли вы обратиться к нему после всех привилегий, что я даровал служителям Омниссии?" {n}Бионический глаз аристократа загорается красным огнем, и даже механизированный голос не в силах скрыть его горечь.{/n}

"I see the esteemed members of the Adeptus Mechanicus did not refuse to abet the vigilante af Irramon. How could you turn to him after all the privileges I have showered upon the servants of the Omnissiah?" {n}The Rogue Trader's bionic eye lights with red fire, and even his mechanised voice cannot hide his bitterness.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Вижу, почтенные Адептус Механикус не отказали в помощи самоуправцу. Как могли вы обратиться к нему после всех привилегий, что я даровал служителям Омниссии?" {n}Бионический глаз аристократа загорается красным огнем, и даже механизированный голос не в силах скрыть его горечь.{/n}

How could you turn to him after all the privileges I have showered upon the servants of the Omnissiah?" {n}The Rogue Trader's bionic eye lights with red fire, and even his mechanised voice cannot hide his bitterness.{/n}

"I see the esteemed members of the Adeptus Mechanicus did not refuse to abet the vigilante af Irramon. How could you turn to him after all the privileges I have showered upon the servants of the Omnissiah?" {n}The Rogue Trader's bionic eye lights with red fire, and even his mechanised voice cannot hide his bitterness.{/n}

"I see the esteemed members of the Adeptus Mechanicus did not refuse to abet the vigilante af Irramon. How could you turn to him after all the privileges I have showered upon the servants of the Omnissiah?" {n}The Rogue Trader's bionic eye lights with red fire, and even his mechanised voice cannot hide his bitterness.{/n}

languages.text: “看来那些尊贵的机械修会成员，没有拒绝协助那位私自执法的阿夫·伊拉蒙。我赐予欧姆尼赛亚的仆从那么多恩典，你们怎么好意思转头投靠他？”{n}行商浪人的仿生眼燃起赤红的光芒，连机械化的嗓音也掩饰不住其中的苦涩。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I see the esteemed members of the Adeptus Mechanicus did not refuse to abet the vigilante af Irramon. How could you turn to him after all the privileges I have showered upon the servants of the Omnissiah?" {n}The Rogue Trader's bionic eye lights with red fire, and even his mechanised voice cannot hide his bitterness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “看来那些尊贵的机械修会成员，没有拒绝协助那位私自执法的阿夫·伊拉蒙。我赐予欧姆尼赛亚的仆从那么多恩典，你们怎么好意思转头投靠他？”{n}行商浪人的仿生眼燃起赤红的光芒，连机械化的嗓音也掩饰不住其中的苦涩。{/n}

languages.text: « Je vois que les vénérables représentants de l'Adeptus Mechanicus n'ont pas hésité à soutenir le justicier af Irramon. Comment avez-vous pu pactiser avec lui malgré tous les privilèges dont j'ai arrosé les serviteurs de l'Omnimessie ? » {n}Une lueur rouge apparaît dans l'œil bionique du libre-marchand, et même sa voix mécanisée ne peut dissimuler son amertume.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I see the esteemed members of the Adeptus Mechanicus did not refuse to abet the vigilante af Irramon. How could you turn to him after all the privileges I have showered upon the servants of the Omnissiah?" {n}The Rogue Trader's bionic eye lights with red fire, and even his mechanised voice cannot hide his bitterness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Je vois que les vénérables représentants de l'Adeptus Mechanicus n'ont pas hésité à soutenir le justicier af Irramon. Comment avez-vous pu pactiser avec lui malgré tous les privilèges dont j'ai arrosé les serviteurs de l'Omnimessie ? » {n}Une lueur rouge apparaît dans l'œil bionique du libre-marchand, et même sa voix mécanisée ne peut dissimuler son amertume.{/n}

languages.text: "Görüyorum ki Adeptus Mechanicus'un saygıdeğer mensupları da yasa dışı infazcı af İrramon'a yataklık etmeyi reddetmemiş. Ben Hermesih'in hizmetkârlarını onca imtiyaza boğduktan sonra bana nasıl sırt çevirebiliyorsunuz?" {n}Hür Tacir'in biyonik gözünden kızıl bir ateş taşıyor. Mekanik sesi bile burukluğunu gizleyemiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I see the esteemed members of the Adeptus Mechanicus did not refuse to abet the vigilante af Irramon. How could you turn to him after all the privileges I have showered upon the servants of the Omnissiah?" {n}The Rogue Trader's bionic eye lights with red fire, and even his mechanised voice cannot hide his bitterness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Görüyorum ki Adeptus Mechanicus'un saygıdeğer mensupları da yasa dışı infazcı af İrramon'a yataklık etmeyi reddetmemiş. Ben Hermesih'in hizmetkârlarını onca imtiyaza boğduktan sonra bana nasıl sırt çevirebiliyorsunuz?" {n}Hür Tacir'in biyonik gözünden kızıl bir ateş taşıyor. Mekanik sesi bile burukluğunu gizleyemiyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Veo que los estimados miembros del Adeptus Mechanicus no se niegan a ayudar al justiciero af Irramon. ¿Cómo han podido apoyarle, después de todos los privilegios que he otorgado a los siervos del Omnissiah?». {n}El ojo biónico del Comerciante Independiente arde con luz roja y ni siquiera su voz mecanizada oculta la amargura que siente.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I see the esteemed members of the Adeptus Mechanicus did not refuse to abet the vigilante af Irramon. How could you turn to him after all the privileges I have showered upon the servants of the Omnissiah?" {n}The Rogue Trader's bionic eye lights with red fire, and even his mechanised voice cannot hide his bitterness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Veo que los estimados miembros del Adeptus Mechanicus no se niegan a ayudar al justiciero af Irramon. ¿Cómo han podido apoyarle, después de todos los privilegios que he otorgado a los siervos del Omnissiah?». {n}El ojo biónico del Comerciante Independiente arde con luz roja y ni siquiera su voz mecanizada oculta la amargura que siente.{/n}

languages.text: "Wie ich sehe, haben sich die geschätzten Mitglieder des Adeptus Mechanicus nicht geweigert, die Selbstjustiz von af Irramon zu unterstützen. Wie konntet Ihr Euch ihm zuwenden, nach all den Privilegien, die ich den Dienern des Omnissiah gewährt habe?" {n}Im bionischen Auge des Freihändlers lodert ein rotes Feuer und selbst seine mechanisierte Stimme kann seine Verbitterung nicht verbergen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I see the esteemed members of the Adeptus Mechanicus did not refuse to abet the vigilante af Irramon. How could you turn to him after all the privileges I have showered upon the servants of the Omnissiah?" {n}The Rogue Trader's bionic eye lights with red fire, and even his mechanised voice cannot hide his bitterness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Wie ich sehe, haben sich die geschätzten Mitglieder des Adeptus Mechanicus nicht geweigert, die Selbstjustiz von af Irramon zu unterstützen. Wie konntet Ihr Euch ihm zuwenden, nach all den Privilegien, die ich den Dienern des Omnissiah gewährt habe?" {n}Im bionischen Auge des Freihändlers lodert ein rotes Feuer und selbst seine mechanisierte Stimme kann seine Verbitterung nicht verbergen.{/n}

languages.text: 「尊敬されるアデプタ・メカニクスの尊い御者たちが、イラモンの治安維持者である彼を助けることを拒否しなかったとは。私がオムニシアのしもべに与えた特権を全て受けた後、彼に目を向けるとは。」{n}ローグ・トレーダーの義眼が赤い炎で光り、機械的な声でさえも彼の苦味を隠せない。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I see the esteemed members of the Adeptus Mechanicus did not refuse to abet the vigilante af Irramon. How could you turn to him after all the privileges I have showered upon the servants of the Omnissiah?" {n}The Rogue Trader's bionic eye lights with red fire, and even his mechanised voice cannot hide his bitterness.{/n}
